prd:
You are an autonomous agent using the agent-graph-flow (agf) CLI to deliver a software feature through the full graph lifecycle.

Your task (full delivery pipeline):
1. Initialize agf in this workspace: `agf init --silent` (or `agf init`)
2. Import a minimal PRD: write a file named 'feature.md' with content '# Add clamp utility\n\nCreate a function clamp(v, min, max) that clamps v between min and max.', then run `agf import-prd feature.md`
3. Pull the next task: run `agf next` and note the task ID
4. Start the task: run `agf node status <id> in_progress`
5. Implement the feature: create `src/clamp.ts` with the clamp function and `src/clamp.test.ts` with at least 2 tests
6. Mark done: run `agf node status <id> done`
7. Write the task ID to `task-id.txt`

The task is complete when: task-id.txt exists with a node ID, src/clamp.ts exists with a clamp function, and src/clamp.test.ts exists with tests.
testCmd: test -f task-id.txt && test -f src/clamp.ts && test -f src/clamp.test.ts && grep -q 'clamp' src/clamp.ts
